name: Amara J.
quote: We used the video guest book at our wedding in September. My grandmother passed last year, and her message is the most precious thing I own. Worth every penny.

name: Keisha & David
quote: Set them on every table. We got 87 video messages. We watch one every anniversary. Best decision we made for the reception.

name: Marcus T.
quote: The life-size standee of me at my graduation party was the hit of the night. My nana cried, my boys took 50 photos with it. I'm 35 now and my mom still has it in the living room.

name: Imani R.
quote: The memory chest is unreal. They engraved my name in gold, and it holds everything — my tiara, my rosary, my last doll, the letter from my mom. I open it on every birthday.

name: The Johnson Family
quote: We ordered the Forever Voice Magnet for my father's service. Hearing his voice say 'I love you' every morning on the fridge is a gift I didn't know I needed.

name: Brianna S.
quote: The custom photo props with my face were EVERYTHING. Every girl at the party wanted one. I'm using them again for my 18th, no question.
